description: Bottom of a legal document with witness signature, [...] b. Shemuʾel. Likely in the hand of Yosef b. Shemuʾel b. Saʿadya ha-Levi. Interestingly, the concluding text states that a genitive word in the body of the text was mistakenly written with a fatḥa and corrected (. . . המא פתח אלמגרור עליה והו צחיח). Such validations of corrections are standard, but it's unusual for them to be about a grammatical slip. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
